game_info.title: WebFishing Sim
game_info.concept:
WEBFISHING a multiplayer chatroom-focused fishing game! Relax and fish (on the web!) Steam URL: https://store.steampowered.com/app/3146520/WEBFISHING/ ================================================================================ Full Description: ================================================================================ WEBFISHING a multiplayer chatroom-focused fishing game! Relax and fish (on the web!)

WEBFISHING is a multiplayer online casual fishing game where you relax, hang out, make friends, and catch fish!

CATCH THEM ALL!

Nearly 100 different creatures to catch- from the smallest snail to the biggest shark- you can catch it! Complete your journal, find rare fish, get loads of money, and get tons of special rewards!

UPGRADE AND CUSTOMIZE!

Become the ultimate fisherman! Upgrade your gear with new baits, lures, and rods- and collect tons of different cosmetics and props to show off your personality!

PLAY WITH FRIENDS!

WEBFISHING is designed around being social and hanging out with friends and strangers in the camp! Meet new people, find hidden spots, make awful fish puns, and catch fish together!

PLAY WITH TOYS!

Play REAL Guitar! Punch your friends! Draw with chalk! There's many tools and toys to play with in the sandbox of WEBFISHING!
game_info.description:
Welcome to WebFishing Sim! A relaxing social fishing experience in your browser.
Explore a cozy island, chat with quirky NPC friends, and catch over 20 unique species of fish!
Cast your line into the blue waters, master the reeling mini-game, and fill your journal.
Earn coins to unlock special colorful outfits. Can you catch the legendary Glitch Fish?
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys / WASD: Move your character
Space: Jump
Z: Cast Line / Hook / Reel In (Hold during mini-game)
Shift: Sprint
Enter: Start Game
Esc: Pause / Resume
R: Restart Game (from Game Over screen)

TEST_1.strategy_description: Simulate holding the 'W' key for 60 frames. Check if the player's Z position has decreased (moved forward) compared to the starting position.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player position.z should be significantly less than startPosition.z.
TEST_1.strategy: Simulate holding the 'W' key for 60 frames. Check if the player's Z position has decreased (moved forward) compared to the starting position.
TEST_1.expected: Player position.z should be significantly less than startPosition.z.

test_1_ModeBtn.strategy_description: Simulate holding the 'W' key for 60 frames. Check if the player's Z position has decreased (moved forward) compared to the starting position.
test_1_ModeBtn.expected_outcome: Player position.z should be significantly less than startPosition.z.
test_1_ModeBtn.strategy: Simulate holding the 'W' key for 60 frames. Check if the player's Z position has decreased (moved forward) compared to the starting position.
test_1_ModeBtn.expected: Player position.z should be significantly less than startPosition.z.

TEST_2.test_description: Verify casting mechanic initiates fishing state.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Move player near water. Simulate pressing 'Z'. Check if gameState.player.isFishing becomes true and a bobber entity is created.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: gameState.player.isFishing is true, and gameState.entities includes a Bobber.
TEST_2.description: Verify casting mechanic initiates fishing state.
TEST_2.strategy: Move player near water. Simulate pressing 'Z'. Check if gameState.player.isFishing becomes true and a bobber entity is created.
TEST_2.expected: gameState.player.isFishing is true, and gameState.entities includes a Bobber.

TEST_3.strategy_description: Force the fishing state to 'WAITING' and fast-forward the bite timer. Verify that state transitions to 'BITING' (bobber dips).
TEST_3.strategy: Force the fishing state to 'WAITING' and fast-forward the bite timer. Verify that state transitions to 'BITING' (bobber dips).

TEST_4.strategy_description: Force a 'HOOKED' state, then simulate perfect reeling (auto-win mini-game). Verify player score/money increases and fish count increments.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: gameState.score increases and inventory length increases by 1.
TEST_4.strategy: Force a 'HOOKED' state, then simulate perfect reeling (auto-win mini-game). Verify player score/money increases and fish count increments.
TEST_4.expected: gameState.score increases and inventory length increases by 1.

TEST_5.strategy_description: Teleport player high above ground and let physics run. Verify player lands on ground Y level (0 or terrain height) and stops falling.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Player velocity.y becomes 0 and position.y is at ground level.
TEST_5.strategy: Teleport player high above ground and let physics run. Verify player lands on ground Y level (0 or terrain height) and stops falling.
TEST_5.expected: Player velocity.y becomes 0 and position.y is at ground level.

TEST_6.strategy_description: Check if NPCs are initialized in the entity list. Verify they perform updates (e.g., change position or state) over 100 frames.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: gameState.npcs.length > 0 and npc position changes or internal timer updates.
TEST_6.strategy: Check if NPCs are initialized in the entity list. Verify they perform updates (e.g., change position or state) over 100 frames.
